name: Junk Meister
effectText: If this card is in your hand: You can reveal 1 "Warrior" or "Stardust" Synchro Monster in your Extra Deck; Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Junk" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Junk Meister". You can target 1 "Junk" monster you control; reduce its Level by up to 2. You can only use each effect of "Junk Meister" once per turn.
